comments: Approved. Reviewed tasks/v0.8.5-m1-uninstall/result-review-packet.json and execution-contract.json, then verified commit a708e0c via git show --stat --name-status and full patch. The commit changes strictly match the execution result artifact: implementation_changes are bin/agent-protocol-uninstall.js, bin/team-agents-cowork.js, and package.json; artifact_changes are tasks/v0.8.5-m1-uninstall/execution-result.json and tasks/v0.8.5-m1-uninstall/result-review-packet.json. bin/agent-protocol-uninstall.js removes .agent-state/ with fs.rmSync(..., { recursive: true, force: true }), removes .agent-state/ lines from .gitignore, and executes git worktree prune via execSync. bin/team-agents-cowork.js adds the uninstall subcommand and routes it to bin/agent-protocol-uninstall.js, with usage text updated accordingly. No Worktree Manager (M2) or MCP Filesystem Proxy (M3) implementation appears in the commit, and git show confirms no modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json, iteration-state.json, or related state semantics outside this M1 patch progression.
